mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.company_name as seller_company_name FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_company c ON p.seller_company_id = c.company_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_product ( tenant_id, seller_company_id, product_code, product_name, item_kind, processing_type, tax_category, unit_name, independent_sale_yn, stock_managed_yn, sale_status, description, image_url, created_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{sellerCompanyId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{itemKind}, #{processingType}, #{taxCategory}, #{unitName}, #{independentSaleYn}, #{stockManagedYn}, #{saleStatus}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_product SET product_name = #{productName}, item_kind = #{itemKind}, processing_type = #{processingType}, tax_category = #{taxCategory}, unit_name = #{unitName}, independent_sale_yn = #{independentSaleYn}, stock_managed_yn = #{stockManagedYn}, sale_status = #{saleStatus}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT pp.*, ch.channel_name, c.company_name as buyer_company_name FROM tb_product_price pp LEFT JOIN tb_channel ch ON pp.channel_id = ch.channel_id LEFT JOIN tb_company c ON pp.buyer_company_id = c.company_id WHERE pp.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pp.effective_from DESC
